title: Global markets fall amid tech sell-off and geopolitical tensions
summary: Stock indices in the US, Europe, and Asia experience heavy losses due to reversal of AI trade and escalation in the Middle East.

title: SpaceX plummets on stock exchange after postponing launch and falling below initial price
summary: Shares of the space company lose value after suspending a launch, and several analysts forecast further declines.

title: Netflix falls sharply on Wall Street as revenue and forecasts disappoint
summary: The streaming platform reports mixed results and reduces quarterly disclosure, triggering mass selling.

title: Strait of Hormuz tensions threaten global oil supply
summary: The risk of closure of the strait and Iranian attacks push up oil prices and pressure shipping companies.

title: Uncertainty over artificial intelligence grows: Alphabet delays its model and Google loses ground
summary: Several companies warn about overvaluation and AI delays, while New York freezes permits for data centers.

title: Trump Media will sell fast access to the president's social media posts
summary: The company offers banks priority access to Trump's posts, generating controversy in the markets.

title: ASSA ABLOY reports strong second-quarter earnings, shares rise
summary: The Swedish lock maker beats expectations and reports an increase in revenue.

title: Changes in retirement plans: the successor to Riester and Social Security updates
summary: Germany and the US propose modifications to pension systems to adapt to new needs.

title: Yen weakens, Euribor rises slightly in currency markets
summary: The Japanese currency remains at lows against the dollar, while the daily Euribor picks up.

title: Fines and financial penalties: PwC and Macquarie banker face regulatory actions
summary: British regulator fines PwC for audit failures and a banker receives conviction for Cum-Ex scandal.

title: Second-quarter results in Europe: Berner, Saab, Danske Bank and other companies beat expectations
summary: Various European companies report positive quarterly earnings, driven by growth in their sectors.

title: Bitcoin falls to $62,884 amid volatility
summary: The leading cryptocurrency edges lower in recent sessions, while crypto stocks perform better.

title: Digi has a volatile stock market debut with sharp ups and downs
summary: The telecom operator makes its market debut with a roller-coaster trading, ending lower.

title: Russian attacks threaten Ukrainian grain trade in the Black Sea
summary: Hostilities put Ukraine's agricultural exports at risk and heighten uncertainty in the global market.

title: Digital euro prepares for beta testing phase
summary: The European Central Bank moves forward with the launch of the official digital currency with experimental tests.

title: Dassault Systèmes negotiates purchase of clinical trial software group for 2 billion
summary: The French industrial software company seeks to expand in the pharmaceutical sector with this acquisition.

title: India ramps up search for uranium and critical minerals, prepares $1 billion IPO
summary: The Indian government boosts its energy security and markets await the IPO of SBI Funds Management.

title: S&P 500 shows ominous warning seen only once before
summary: A historical pattern in the US index suggests potential future declines according to analysts.

title: History suggests Nvidia shares could be cheap, but investors hesitate
summary: Despite their relative low price, uncertainties in the semiconductor market create caution.

title: Elon Musk maintains his view on Tesla, should investors buy the dip?
summary: The CEO's optimism contrasts with the recent weakness of the stock, which some see as an opportunity.
